## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Audio/mixing behavior
- [ ] AI agent behavior
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run audit:all`
- [ ] `npm run test:visual` for UI/3D changes

## Screenshots or recordings

Add before/after images or recordings for UI, 3D, or performance behavior changes.

## Audio/AI notes

For DJ behavior changes, describe the tested crate/vibe, the track pair, and whether the transition stayed phrase-aligned without silence or premature UI handoff.

## Security and licensing

- [ ] No secrets, cookies, downloaded audio, or local cache files are included.
- [ ] New assets are redistributable and attributed.
- [ ] Public API behavior is documented if changed.
